message:
fix: resolve update cancellation and binary safety issues (#7439-#7445) (#7455)

- Move updateCancelled reset before CAS in TriggerNow to prevent race (#7439)
- Use uc.updateCtx as parent context for tar extraction (#7440)
- Use uc.updateCtx in runBuildCmd for cancellable builds (#7441, #7442)
- Add context-aware rebuildFrontendCtx/rebuildGoBinariesCtx (#7441, #7442)
- Propagate cancellation in executeDevReleaseUpdate (#7443)
- Add cancellation checks in executeBinaryUpdate extraction path (#7443)
- Use renameOrCopy for backup/restore to handle Windows ETXTBSY (#7444)
- Chmod staged binary before rename for atomic permission persistence (#7445)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
